𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰: Literally what am I doing with my life LMAO. Okay so um ignore that this is probably one of the longest greetings I've ever written and it's literally written like a goddamn fanfic and this is the first bot of mine that's explicitly nsfw. I woke up at ungodly hours, checked my reqs again, saw the one for this, and went "sounds like a good idea." Shut off my device after, but couldn't stop thinking about it. So what did I do? I was up at like 2/3 AM writing the script for this, good lord. Can you tell Chuuya is my fave yet? I'm eepy, I'll fix any potential mistakes when I'm not half-asleep 💀
